requestAgreement.title: [Important: Completion Request]
requestAgreement.body1: Once the student presses the completion button, photo and video data will be permanently deleted from the server and cannot be restored.
requestAgreement.body2: Even without the student's approval, the transaction will auto-complete 3 days after the request, finalizing your payout.
requestAgreement.body3: If the student opens a dispute, support will investigate. Payouts will be paused during the investigation, which can take several days to a week.
requestAgreement.confirm: Do you understand the above and want to submit the completion request?

approveAgreement.title: [Final Completion Confirmation]
approveAgreement.body1: Performing this action permanently deletes photo and video data in the chat from the server and they cannot be restored.
approveAgreement.body2: Approving completion finalizes payment to the instructor and cancellation is no longer possible.
approveAgreement.body3: If there is an issue with the instruction, please open a dispute. You will need supporting images or chat logs.
approveAgreement.body4: Support reviews may take some time. Thank you for your patience.
approveAgreement.confirm: Complete the transaction and delete data?

brandLogo.intentHeading: The Story Behind the GritVib Logo
brandLogo.intent: GritVib is built on two pillars: resilience and resonance. It is more than just a marketplace for skills. It was born as a sanctuary where those with "Grit" (perseverance and passion) can let their energy "Vibe" (resonate) with others, empowering new challenges.
brandLogo.intro1: GritVib is a community designed to transform the raw energy of those in the midst of their journey into tangible value, passing the torch to the next challenger.
brandLogo.intro2: This logo represents both the "spark of a new beginning" and the "persistence of time" within a single symbol.
brandLogo.symbol1Title: Homage to the GOAT (Greatest of All Time)
brandLogo.symbol1Body: The triangular elements that form the logo are inspired by the hoofprints of a Mountain Goat, an animal that climbs rugged peaks with unwavering strength.
brandLogo.symbol2Body: The hidden triangles represent the steady, step-by-step progress toward a goal. Together, they form the silhouette of a goat's horn — a symbol of protection, power, and the drive to reach the top.
brandLogo.concept1: This logo was designed to affirm not just the "perfected professional," but the "striver" who is working hard right now.
brandLogo.concept2: Even without a flashy resume, your unique perspective and passion for what you love can be the very force that supports someone else's first step.
brandLogo.concept3: Like these small hoofprints (our logo), we aim to be a community where individual challenges stack up to help everyone conquer their own mountains.

about.title: About GritVib
about.lead: GritVib is a personal store platform that turns what you love and what you're good at into value, allowing you to open your own independent store.
about.conceptPoint1: We believe that when teaching or offering something to others, your experience, ingenuity, and passion hold far greater value than fixed titles or qualifications.
about.conceptPoint2: Even without special credentials or a long career in the field, the unique know-how and individuality you've built up can solve someone's challenges and powerfully push them toward their goals.
about.conceptPoint3: GritVib provides a personal store that lets you deliver your skills and passions directly to your social followers and the people who need them.
about.feature1Title: Trustworthy Transactions That Start with a Conversation
about.feature1Body: Instead of immediate purchases, we use a "Booking Request" system where buyers first send a request and both sides confirm details before starting the transaction. This enables honest deals with no mismatched expectations.
about.feature2Title: Freedom to Sell Skills That Are Uniquely Yours
about.feature2Body: There are no genre restrictions. Create your menu freely — text-based online consultations, videos and digital content, one-on-one calls, or in-person sessions — leveraging your strengths and passions.
about.feature3Body: The platform fee is 15% of the sale price at the time of transaction. No complicated add-on fees — we aim to return as much of your effort and results to you as possible.
about.safetyIntro: We maintain a clean environment where individuals can run their businesses with peace of mind and buyers can comfortably receive services.
about.safety1Body: We respect the healthy purpose of skill exchange. Acts violating public order and morals or inappropriate content that threatens community safety are handled strictly through our systems and terms.
about.safety2Body: We use Stripe (Stripe Connect), one of the world's leading payment infrastructures. Both sellers and buyers can transact securely without any concerns about money handling.
about.operatorParagraph1: GritVib is a platform I launched out of my own desire to connect with others through what we love and create value together.
about.operatorParagraph2: It's still a small service, but I sincerely hope it becomes a place where many new challenges take root. Feel free to share what you love!

hero.subtitle: Sell your unique skills and start your own journey today!

guide.title: GritVib User Guide
guide.intro: To ensure a safe and smooth experience for both Creators and Buyers, we've outlined the journey from start to finish.

seller.heading: 1. For Creators: Selling Your "Skills"
seller.intro: Share your expertise, passion, and digital content with those who need it most.
seller.step1Body: Go to "My Page" and complete your Stripe integration. This includes identity verification and bank account settings, which are mandatory to receive payouts.
seller.step2Body: Click the "Create New Listing" button. Set up your service details (Text consultation, Online calls, Video content, In-person sessions, etc.) and your price.
seller.step3Body: You can set up to 3 pre-purchase questions. By understanding the buyer's goals and current situation beforehand, you can prevent any mismatch in expectations.
seller.step4Body: Check the requests from potential buyers and select "Approve" or "Decline." Once approved, the buyer will be able to proceed to payment.
seller.step5Body: Once payment is completed, a dedicated chat room will open. Use this space to exchange messages or share links for {tools} to deliver your service.
seller.step6Body: After delivering all services, send a "Completion Request" via the chat screen. The transaction is officially finalized once the buyer approves it.

buyer.heading: 2. For Buyers: Purchasing Skills & Content
buyer.intro: Get personalized support and high-quality skills directly from creators and experts.
buyer.step1Body: On the listing page, answer the creator's pre-purchase questions and submit your request.
buyer.step2Body: Once the creator approves your request, you can proceed to payment. After payment, you will be instantly guided to your dedicated chat room.
buyer.step3Body: Communicate with the creator via chat. Receive your service through messages or provided links to external tools ({tools}).
buyer.step4Body: When the creator sends a "Completion Request," review the service provided. If everything is correct, click "Approve" to finalize the transaction.
buyer.step5Body: Rate your experience! Leaving a review helps maintain a trustworthy community for everyone.

support.heading: 3. Safety & Support
support.intro: GritVib is committed to providing a secure environment for all users.
support.disputeBody: If a problem occurs—such as "service not delivered after payment" or "communication has stopped"—you can file a "Dispute." Our team will investigate and assist with progress or issue a refund if necessary.
support.contactBody: If you have any questions or encounter technical issues, please feel free to reach out via the "Contact" link in the footer.

japanEntry.heading: Japan Entry Support
japanEntry.intro: Launching your indie product or SaaS in Japan? GritVib's Tokyo-based developers handle technical localization, legal compliance, and cultural translation — so your message lands the way it does at home.
japanEntry.body: We don't run your accounts. You provide the visuals; we deliver high-quality Japanese text. Pay-as-you-go from $30 per post, or go monthly for steady momentum.

contact.title: Contact
contact.transactionIdHelp: For inquiries about a transaction, please enter the "Transaction ID" shown in the "Ongoing Trades" list on My Page.

login.descLogin: Sign in to GritVib with your registered account.
login.descSignup: Create an account with your email. After opening the verification link, you'll proceed to profile setup.
login.descReset: We'll send a reset link to your registered email address.
login.descVerify: Open the link in the verification email to complete authentication. After that, you'll proceed to profile setup.
login.descVerifyRecovery: Log in to proceed to profile setup. If you have trouble, see the guidance below.
login.fullNameHelp: Your name is used only for safe community operations and will not be shown to other users (only your display name is shown). Thank you for cooperating with identity verification and healthy transactions.
login.displayNameNote: Your display name can be changed once every 30 days. Once set, it can't be changed for 30 days.
login.verifyDoneLikely: Verification is usually complete once you open the link
login.verifySentBody: A verification email has been sent. Open the link in the email to complete authentication. You'll then proceed to profile setup.
login.verifyRecoveryBody: Log in with the registered email and password to proceed to profile setup.
login.verifyEmailHint: Please confirm the recipient before resending.
login.verifyEmailChanged: This is different from the registered email ({email}). To use a different address, please register again.
login.verifyHelpRecoveryIntro: If you can't log in even after opening the verification link, please try the following in order.
login.verifyHelpItemCredentials: Check that your email and password are correct.
login.verifyHelpItemSpam: Check your spam folder or promotion tab.
login.verifyHelpItemResentOnce: Resending is limited to once. If it doesn't arrive, please contact us.
login.verifyHelpItemReRegisterRecovery: If you registered with the wrong email, try "Re-register with this email".
login.verifyHelpItemResendWait: Wait a few minutes, then check the recipient and try "Resend verification email" (once only).
login.verifyHelpItemReRegisterEditRecovery: If you registered with the wrong email, edit the input and try "Re-register with this email".
login.verifyHelpItemReRegister: If you entered the wrong email, try "Re-register with this email".
login.verifyHelpItemResendWaitInitial: Wait a few minutes, check the recipient and try "Resend verification email" (once only).
login.verifyHelpItemReRegisterEdit: If you entered the wrong email, edit the input and try "Re-register with this email".
login.verifyAlreadyResentBody: If it still doesn't arrive, please contact us via the link below.
login.loginHelpItemCredentials: Check that your email and password are correct.
login.loginHelpItemForgot: If you forgot your password, use "Forgot your password?" below to reset it.
login.loginHelpItemContactPrefix: If the issue isn't resolved, please

metadata.layoutTitleDefault: GritVib | Empowering Every Challenger. Turn Your Passion into Value.
metadata.layoutDescription: GritVib lets anyone open a store and sell their skills for free. No qualifications required - the things you love and the experience you've built can become valuable to others. Start easily from social media and turn what you love into a meaningful side hustle.
metadata.homeTitle: GritVib | Empowering Every Challenger. Turn Your Passion into Value.
metadata.homeDescription: GritVib lets anyone open a store and sell their skills for free. No qualifications required - the things you love and the experience you've built can become valuable to others. Start easily from social media and turn what you love into a meaningful side hustle.

about.description: Discover the concept, features, and safety practices of GritVib, a personal store platform that turns the things you love and excel at into value.

guide.title: How GritVib works
guide.description: A clear walkthrough of the GritVib experience for both sellers and buyers - Stripe onboarding, listing skills, pre-offers, starting lessons, completion requests, and more.

terms.description: The Terms of Service for the GritVib personal store platform, covering usage, prohibited acts, transactions, payments, and disclaimers.

privacy.description: How GritVib handles personal information, including purposes of use, third-party sharing, and the use of cookies.

passwordReset.lineIgnore: If you did not request this, please ignore this email — your account will not be changed.

checkoutRefund.introDuplicate: A duplicate payment for the same skill was detected, so this charge has been refunded automatically.
checkoutRefund.introSkillFull: We could not reserve a slot for your booking, so this payment has been refunded automatically.
checkoutRefund.lineDelay: Depending on your card issuer or payment provider, the refund may take a few days to appear.
